calendar.matters:
MOTION TO AMEND/MODIFY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Court Call Apearances:
David Emerzian, Esq. of McCormick, Barstow & Sheppard, 559-433-1300 for plaintiff and moving party RMC Construction
Ray Rockwell, Esq., 925-932-7785 for defendant and opposing party Joseph Callahan

RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENATIVE RULING.
PLAINTIFF RMC CONSTRUCTIONS' MOTION TO AMEND/MODIFY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT CALLAHAN PARTICIPATED IN AND/OR CONTROLLED THE LITIGATION THAT GAVE RISE TO THE JUDGMENT AS REQUIRED BY NEC ELECTRONICS INC. V. HURT (1989) 208 CAL.APP.3RD 772, 781. MATTER WAS HEARD AT 11:30 AM TO GIVE THE PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY TO REVIEW THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Discharged

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

Off Calendar Dec-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER RMC CONSTRUCTIONS' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RULING: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER (PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, DAVID EMERZIAN (559.433.1300) FAILED TO CALL IN THROUGH COURTCALL). THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING, GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER. (302/REQ/ju) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Patricia J. Van Steenberge, CSR 1742

Application For Right To Attach Order And Temporary Protective Order
Off Calendar Dec-08-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ATTY. DAVID L. EMERZIAN APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF FOR THE PLAINTIFF;

RULING - TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS- Plaintiff RMC Constructors ex parte application for right to attach order and writ of attachment is denied without prejudice for plaintiff to file a noticed motion. The application for a temporary protective order is granted. Said order will remain in effect until January 18, 2007. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Off Calendar Oct-11-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER RMC CONSTRUCTIONS' ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.
APPEARANCES: David L. Emerzian, Esq., for Petitioner and Moving Party; No other appearances on this matter.
RULING: Proof of service presented in open court and verified. The Court modified its tentatie ruling - Petition to Compel Arbitration is Granted. Order signed in open court. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558. (301/JLW).
